questions.question: Explain the concept of Star and Snowflake schemas in the context of Data Warehousing. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Describe the advantages and disadvantages of each schema

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of a Data Warehouse Architecture diagram? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Refer to Chapter 4 of the textbook for more information

questions.question: Describe the key stakeholders involved in the Planning phase of a Data Warehouse project. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Include the roles of Business Analysts, IT Managers, and End-Users
